sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48692" key="qhmologe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θημολογέω</orth>, <sense id="n48692.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">collect in a heap</tr_>, shortd. from <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θημωνολογέω</foreign> (metri.gr.), <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ψαμμίτην δόρπον</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.551</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antiphil.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
